LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER IN-TREPID709, LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS BY AND BETWEEN DUSTIN BURT II AND IN-TREPID709, LLC PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA INSURANCE CODE 10134, ET SEQ. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Dustin Burt Ii And In-Trepid709, Llc Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq.
Off Calendar May-31-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Sanpreet Gil, Esq. (818.521.1287) for Petitioner (audio only).
Dustin Burt, Payee, in propria persona.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER IN-TREPID709, LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Dustin Burt II And In-Trepid709, LLC Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq. is approved. Mr. Gil stated parties agree to an increased purchase price of $20,924.20 which equals 19%.

Counsel for petitioner to submit a proposed order with the increased purchase price discussed during the hearing and a revised transfer agreement in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
